entries.question: How do you perform a factory reset on the TX-9000 router?
entries.expected_answer: To perform a factory reset, hold the physical reset button on the back panel for 10 seconds using a paperclip until the status LED flashes red.

expected_citations.excerpt: Press and hold the reset button for 10 seconds. Release when status LED blinks red.
